objective: Close GAP-003 by adding public JSON Schema contracts, examples, blocker metadata for not-yet-emitted packets, and parity validation for runtime cockpit packet surfaces without changing runtime behavior.
assumptions: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 is sufficient for public contract publication.
Evidence-receipt/v1 is admitted as a shared schema dependency because review-state, external-state, runtime-card, and delivery-truth packets reference receipt-backed evidence.

Decision-request/v1 and session-context/v1 are not yet emitted production packets; this slice may publish their intended schema examples and manifest entries only when the manifest marks their runtime status as not_yet_emitted and points to GAP-005 or GAP-004 as the implementation owner.
The first slice should publish schemas for the packet shapes and add a repo-owned parity validator without adding a new dependency.
Runtime behavior, CLI output behavior, and closeout authority remain unchanged in this slice.
nonGoals: Do not wire schema validation into production command execution yet.
Do not install AJV or another schema validator in this slice.
Do not redesign existing TypeScript packet interfaces.
Do not claim broad external consumer compatibility beyond the published schema and fixture parity checks.
implementationApproach: Add JSON Schema files under contracts/ for evidence-receipt/v1 plus the GAP-003 packet surfaces: runtime-card/v1, harness-decision/v1, review-state/v1, external-state-snapshot/v1, delivery-truth/v1, decision-request/v1, and session-context/v1.
Add small example fixtures for each public packet shape under contracts/examples/.
Add a manifest mapping schemaVersion to schema path, example path, owning TypeScript source when present, runtime status, and blocker owner when not yet emitted.

Add a dependency-free validator script that verifies manifest entries, schema const values, required example fields, schemaVersion alignment, not-yet-emitted blocker metadata, and the existing TypeScript validators for packet types that already expose validators.
Add focused tests for the validator script, including a negative drift fixture.
validationGates: pnpm exec biome check contracts/runtime-card.schema.json contracts/harness-decision.schema.json contracts/review-state.schema.json contracts/external-state-snapshot.schema.json contracts/delivery-truth.schema.json contracts/decision-request.schema.json contracts/session-context.schema.json contracts/evidence-receipt.schema.json contracts/runtime-packet-schemas.manifest.json contracts/examples/runtime-card.example.json contracts/examples/harness-decision.example.json contracts/examples/review-state.example.json contracts/examples/external-state-snapshot.example.json contracts/examples/delivery-truth.example.json contracts/examples/evidence-receipt.example.json contracts/examples/decision-request.example.json contracts/examples/session-context.example.json contracts/examples/invalid/runtime-packet-schema-version-drift.example.json scripts/validate-runtime-packet-schemas.cjs src/dev/validate-runtime-packet-schemas-script.test.ts

git diff --check -- contracts/runtime-card.schema.json contracts/harness-decision.schema.json contracts/review-state.schema.json contracts/external-state-snapshot.schema.json contracts/delivery-truth.schema.json contracts/decision-request.schema.json contracts/session-context.schema.json contracts/evidence-receipt.schema.json contracts/runtime-packet-schemas.manifest.json contracts/examples/runtime-card.example.json contracts/examples/harness-decision.example.json contracts/examples/review-state.example.json contracts/examples/external-state-snapshot.example.json contracts/examples/delivery-truth.example.json contracts/examples/evidence-receipt.example.json contracts/examples/decision-request.example.json contracts/examples/session-context.example.json contracts/examples/invalid/runtime-packet-schema-version-drift.example.json scripts/validate-runtime-packet-schemas.cjs src/dev/validate-runtime-packet-schemas-script.test.ts .harness/intent/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit-pu-021-gap-003-public-packet-schemas-intent.json artifacts/reviews/pu-021-gap-003-public-packet-schemas-intent-adversarial.md artifacts/reviews/pu-021-gap-003-public-packet-schemas-intent-agent-native.md artifacts/reviews/pu-021-gap-003-public-packet-schemas-intent-best-practices.md
stopConditions: Existing packet TypeScript interfaces are found to contradict the proposed public schema.
The validator would need a new package dependency or production runtime behavior change to prove useful.
Schema publication would falsely imply production enforcement or external-state freshness proof.
Decision-request or session-context schema examples cannot be marked with explicit not-yet-emitted ownership tied to GAP-005/GAP-004.
Allowed files collide with unrelated dirty worktree changes that cannot be separated safely.
rollbackPath: Remove the added contracts/* schema files, contracts/examples/* fixtures, runtime packet schema manifest, validator script, and validator test.
Leave earlier runtime packet implementations untouched.
acceptanceCriteria: All targeted public packet schema files exist under contracts/ with Draft 2020-12 metadata and exact schemaVersion consts.
Decision-request/v1 and session-context/v1 are either schema-backed with not-yet-emitted blocker metadata or explicitly recorded as blocked by GAP-005/GAP-004 ownership.
The manifest maps every targeted schemaVersion to its schema, example fixture, owning TypeScript source when present, and runtime status.
The validator fails on schema/example version drift and passes against the checked-in schemas and examples.
Existing TypeScript validators are used as parity checks where available.
Goal receipts record GAP-003 adoption with current audit hash and local validation evidence.
No production runtime source, CLI command, package manifest, or lockfile changes are included in this slice.
